description: Enumerate the public methods of a smart contract. Two input modes: pass 'address' to introspect a deployed contract (ContractMethodsGet), or pass 'byteCodeObjects' to introspect freshly compiled bytecode before deploy (ContractAllMethodsGet).
notes: ContractMethodsGet may return an empty methods list for contracts the executor doesn't have cached — in that case pass byteCodeObjects (recoverable from /SmartContract/Get) to fall back to ContractAllMethodsGet.
